hero.name: Laura
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I’m passionate about building modern applications where architecture, user experience, and design all matter equally. I enjoy turning ideas into clean, accessible, and enjoyable products.

about.title: Software is my profession. Curiosity is my engine.
about.subtitle: More than writing code, I enjoy building experiences that are clear, maintainable, and pleasant to use.
about.card1P1: I started coding out of curiosity and eventually fell in love with the power of software to solve real problems.
about.card1P2: Over time, I discovered that I especially enjoy frontend, where I can combine architecture, logic, and design to create products that feel great to use.
about.card1P3: I keep learning every day because I believe developers never stop improving.

skills.title: This is how I like to build software.
skills.subtitle: Technologies change constantly. The way we think about an application is what stays.
skills.frontendDescription: Modern interfaces, scalable architecture, and a user experience carefully crafted down to the last detail.
skills.backendDescription: Clean APIs, maintainable code, and architectures that are easy to extend.
skills.cloudDescription: Automating processes and deploying applications is part of modern development too.
skills.databaseDescription: Simple modeling, efficient queries, and structures that are easy to maintain.

projects.title: Some things I built.
projects.subtitle: Each project represents a different problem, a different solution, and a lot of learning.

contact.title: Shall we build something together?
contact.subtitle: I’m always open to talking about new projects, job opportunities, or simply about technology.
contact.note: Thanks for making it this far. This portfolio was designed and developed from scratch with Angular, TypeScript, SASS, and lots of mate. I hope you enjoyed exploring it as much as I enjoyed building it.
